title: PRMP Task-Type Effect: Why PRMP Helps Regression but Not Classification (F1 + rel-stack Instrumented Comparison)
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed PRMP experiment results across 5 RelBench tasks (2 datasets). Loads 71 curated examples from mini_demo_data.json covering epoch records, run summaries, test instances, and cross-task analysis. Visualizes PRMP improvement delta by task type (regression vs classification), training loss curves, embedding statistics, and summary comparisons. Confirms key finding: PRMP benefits regression more than classification.
